news.title: Best Crypto Presale of 2026: Why Analysts Are Calling AlphaPepe the “Bitcoin” of AI Meme Coins
news.description: The “Bitcoin of” label gets applied loosely in crypto. It means one thing precisely: the asset that defines and dominates its category before the rest of the market understands what the category is worth. Bitcoin did it for digital money. Ethereum did it for smart contracts. Analysts calling AlphaPepe the Bitcoin of AI meme coins are [...] The post Best Crypto Presale of 2026: Why Analysts Are Calling AlphaPepe the “Bitcoin” of AI Meme Coins appeared first on TechBullion .

news.title: Daughter of Ifugao rises to lead major gold miner
news.description: MANILA, Philippines — Joan Adaci-Cattiling, whose veins carry the bloodline of indigenous people (IP) who built and farmed on rice terraces, is no stranger to social inequality. The lawyer-president of OceanaGold Philippines Inc. (OGP)—the country’s second largest producer of gold and copper, and the biggest gainer in the local stock market in 2025—grew up in the [...]... Keep on reading: Daughter of Ifugao rises to lead major gold miner

news.title: Ghana’s Gold Reserve Policy Reversal: An Analytical Review of Costs, Timing, and Governance
news.description: Gold bars and Financial concept,3d rendering,conceptual image. In the final quarter of 2025, the Bank of Ghana (BoG) liquidated approximately 18.5 tonnes of the country’s gold reserves, representing roughly half of its then total gold holdings at a price of USD 3,500 per ounce, generating estimated gross proceeds of approximately USD 2.22 billion.
